query: backlit silhouette obscured anonymous figure against bright window subject in shadow
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: backlit silhouette — anonymous figures, identity erased by exposure choice, sinister window-light contrejour

response.objective_caption: Upright stone grave markers with carved inscriptions and ornamental reliefs, floral wreaths arranged at the base of a central monument, and bright light visible behind the stones in a cemetery setting.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A cemetery scene rendered with extreme analog degradation, showing upright stone grave markers with carved inscriptions, ornamental reliefs, and floral wreaths arranged at the base of a central monument. Heavy chemical staining, crystalline spotting, and emulsion damage dissolve detail across the entire frame, while a sickly yellow-brown tint shifts stone and organic surfaces toward hues suggesting rot and contamination. The center is blown out by an intensely overexposed light source against an oppressively low-contrast, murky background with severe color inconsistency. The combined deterioration creates an atmosphere of dread and surreal decay, merging the cemetery subject with the corrupted image medium.
